title: Spicy Juicy Juiced Baby Pak Choi Salad
description: A spicy and juicy baby pak choi salad that is a crowd-pleaser and paleo-friendly.

ingredients.name: Baby Pak Choi
ingredients.notes: Use the inner stems for a sweeter flavor

instructions: Sauté garlic in coconut oil until fragrant. Do not burn it.
Add soy sauce, lime juice, red pepper flakes and lemon zest into the pot with the sautéed garlic, cook for 20 minutes at 140°F (60°C).
Cut baby pak choi into bite-sized pieces. Place in a bowl of cold water to help remove any dirt.
Drain the baby pak choi and pat dry with paper towels. Squeeze the excess water out using paper towels again.
Mix together coconut oil, soy sauce, lime juice, garlic paste, sesame seeds (if used), olive oil for dressing.
Add dressing into a bowl of drained baby pak choi. Toss well until all pieces are coated evenly with dressing.
Serve the salad and garnish with extra sesame seeds if desired.
